title: celmisia glandulosa var. longiscapa
intro: Celmisia glandulosa var. longiscapa is a subspecies of the Celmisia glandulosa plant, a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. Celmisia glandulosa var. longiscapa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, and it has been used in traditional Maori medicine for generations.
